name: EPIC Dashboard Plugin — Risk Score Example

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ panels: [{ id: 'risk-score', label: 'Risk Score', title: 'Sepsis Risk Score', description: 'Lightweight sepsis screening via labs and vitals', webhook: 'risk-score-run', trigger: 'auto' }, { id: 'care-gaps', label: 'Care Gaps', title: 'Care Gap Analysis', description: 'Preventive care items the patient is overdue for', webhook: 'care-gaps-run', trigger: 'button', buttonLabel: 'Check Care Gaps' }] }) }}
